results.title: Slovenia Digital Nomad Visa: Complete Guide for Remote Workers
results.description: Remote workers are discovering Slovenia. Low cost of living, EU location, excellent internet, and high quality of life make it attractive. But to stay legally, you need the right visa... Read the full article on TechBullion.

results.title: Haryana’s Food, Supplies Department asks DCs to restrict sale of High Speed Diesel
results.description: The Food, Civil Supplies and Consumer Affairs Department, Haryana, on Saturday asked deputy commissioners and District Food and Supplies Controllers (DFSCs) to restrict the unusually high sale and unauthorised inter-state movement of High Speed Diesel from retail pumps. As per the letter dated May 30, addressed to DCs, it was intimated, “It has come to [...]

results.title: 10 most expensive homes sold in Wayne area, May 18-24
results.description: A single-family home in Wayne that sold for $1.27 million tops the list of the most expensive residential real estate sales in Wayne area during the past week.
